tests.description: ATDD API tests for queue contract safety, deterministic ordering, and voicemail ownership behavior (RED PHASE)
acceptance_criteria_covered: Given Inbox or Mine is rendered, when thread rows are displayed, then each row is a card-level tap target with human-readable summary, preview, timestamp, and context pills.

Given volunteer-primary queue surfaces are rendered, when content is mapped from backend contracts, then raw state chips, priority integers, number IDs, and webhook/system metadata are not primary UI copy.
Given queue ordering is evaluated, when records are returned, then ordering remains deterministic and maps to human urgency language; queue search remains persistent in Inbox and Mine.
Given voicemail events are present, when queue cards are rendered, then claimed-thread voicemail remains in Mine and indicators are visible without ownership churn.

summary: Generated 4 FAILING API tests for story g-2
